Patch Set 1:

@morgan, any thoughts why healthdist is not passing?

Patch Set 1:

@Sylvain, @Morgan, I made an change to aai/oom repo where all I did was add an comment and I have seen the same healthdist failing so I don't think it has anything to do with this change.

https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/aai/oom/+/113818

If you look at the gating results there, I have seen the healthdist fail there as well

https://logs.onap.org/onap-integration/gating//113818-1/index.html

Patch Set 1:

effectively it is weird

basic_vm is OK so the mechanism to onboard/distribute looks fine
healthdist is supposed to do the same thing using robot
https://logs.onap.org/onap-integration/gating//113627-1/xtesting-healthcheck/healthdist/healthdist/log.html#s1-t1
 	Received response from [sdc]: {"status":"EXPECTATION_FAILED","errorCode":"JSON_MAPPING_ERROR_ERR_ID","message":"Error occurred while parsing the JSON input/body. Further info can be found in the log"}

the last merged patch (1st of June) on aai/oom in frankfurt is here: https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/aai/oom/+/108242
the result of the healthdist was PASS

According to gerrit, 2 patches have been merged since the 1st of June on the frankfurt branch used to build the testing dockers
https://gerrit.onap.org/r/q/project:testsuite+status:merged+branch:frankfurt dealing with pnf-registrate + one with AAI (create_customer) but nothing to deal with any SDC request

Finally the test is also PASS on our last frankfurt daily executed recently (13th of October) https://logs.onap.org/onap-integration/daily/onap_daily_pod4_frankfurt/10-13-2020_05-10/

I will rebase (on frankfurt) and give a new try..
